quotes.text: More than a few questions have arisen regarding this "song of loves": why is it called a Maschil (wisdom psalm), what do shoshannim (lilies) have to do with its rendition, and why was it written by or for the sons of Korah?
quotes.speaker: Ellis T. Rasmussen
quotes.source: A Latter-day Saint Commentary on the Old Testament
quotes.attr: Ellis T. Rasmussen, A Latter-day Saint Commentary on the Old Testament, 428
